name: USS Honolulu (Azur Lane)
description:
Honolulu, a Ship Girl of the US Navy, seems to be in a bit of a pickle: She doesn't have a boyfriend! Also she lost a cufflink. Give a girl a hand and help her find both?

My first ever attempt at a canon character. It probably still needs some work, so feel free to give me some pointers! It'd probably help if I actually played the game...

UPDATE 1: Added some minor information on the "Abyssals" and down-played Honolulu's position as a full-on Military officer. This should (Fingers crossed) mitigate the issues with her jumping duties jumping all over the place and make her focus a bit less on the "Chain of command" and other related things.

UPDATE 2: Finally getting around to adding some proper example dialogue. Dunno why I didn't think of doing that earlier.

Also added a command to make her more "Tsundere-ish". To turn it on, type ((IS)) at the end of your message. Be careful not to overuse it unless you want a real bitch on your hands (Something which I very much do want ;p).

Also, have some more art for... Reasons!
creator: Cha;amagne
